"I would rather have questions that can't be answered than answers that can't be questioned."

Choose Your Journey

From the absolute solitude of a private expedition to the shared joy of a group patrol, discover the safari style that speaks to you.

Private Safaris

Your journey, your pace. A fully personalized experience with a private vehicle and a dedicated Feynman guide.

  • Exclusive vehicle
  • Customized itinerary
  • Expert private guide
Inquire Expertly Curated

Luxury Safaris

The pinnacle of comfort in the wild. Stay in the continent's most prestigious lodges and camps.

  • 5-star accommodations
  • Bespoke service
  • Bush dining & sundowners
Inquire Expertly Curated

Group Joining Tours

Connect with like-minded adventurers. Scheduled departures offering social exploration and exceptional value.

  • Shared costs
  • Social experience
  • Pre-set dates
Inquire Expertly Curated

Bespoke Experiences

Weddings, honeymoons, or scientific expeditions. We design what you imagine.

  • Thematic planning
  • Specialized logistics
  • Memorable milestones
Inquire Expertly Curated

Not sure which one to pick?

Speak with our safari architects. We build expeditions around your dreams, not catalogs.
